title: Clans of the Ancients
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Clans of the Ancients''' was the name given to a number of [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] clans that could trace their ancestry back to their [[Species/Legends|species]]' [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Varl/Legends|Varl]]. The [[Desilijic/Legends|Desilijic]], [[Besadii/Legends|Besadii]], [[Qunaalac]], [[Bareesh]], [[Gorensla/Legends|Gorensla]], [[Kajidier]], [[Jiramma]], [[Vanderijar]], and [[Vosadii]] clans were among the Clans of the Ancients, and only members of the Clans of the Ancients could hold a position on the [[Grand Hutt Council/Legends|Hutt Ruling Council]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1989-XX-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races (Second Edition)|''Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races'', Second Edition]]
